concerns.text: Task T012 combines 10 distinct operations (fetching, aggregation, filtering, preprocessing, output) into one task. The atomizer will split this downstream. Consider splitting into separate ingestion, preprocessing, and output tasks.

Task T023 combines 12 distinct operations (correlation, lag analysis, bootstrap, correction, control region, etc.) into one task. The atomizer will split this downstream. Consider splitting into separate analysis components.
Task T037 combines 3 different visualization outputs into one task. The atomizer will split this downstream. Consider separate tasks for each plot type.

Task T038 combines 6 distinct requirements (threshold sweep, stability reporting, CI overlap, bias documentation, keyword validation, null result handling) into one task. The atomizer will split this downstream.
All three contract test tasks reference the same file path (tests/contract/test_schemas.py). This will cause conflicts. Each should use distinct test functions or separate files.
All three integration test tasks reference the same file path (tests/integration/test_pipeline.py). This will cause conflicts. Each should use distinct test functions or separate files.

Tasks T044-T046 reference 'Phase 2/3/4' but the task phases are numbered 1-6. This is confusing. Reference actual phase names (Setup, Foundational, User Story 1, etc.) or code scripts (01_data_ingestion.py, etc.).

Task T050 references quickstart.md validation but quickstart.md is not created in the task list. The file must exist before this task can execute. Either create quickstart.md first or remove this validation task.

Task T008 mentions URL verification but Constitution Principle II requires citation verification (reachability + title-token-overlap). The task should specify both URL reachability AND citation validation per Principle II.
